health_conditions: history of grand mal seizures (15 episodes)
prior heavy drug and alcohol abuse (10 years, 6 years sober)

benefits.description: Attempting to heal drug-induced brain damage

side_effects.description: Overstimulated, tense, wired sensation; feels like cortisol wave; head pressure; internal stress response; scared easily; frightening experiences felt more traumatic; jaw and brain felt locked and tense at higher doses

protocol_notes: Tested three different brands from two different vendors across three occasions with consistent side effects. Started at 0.2 IU on day 1, 0.5 IU on day 2. Previously tried 1-2 IU daily with worse symptoms lasting weeks after stopping. Intended to titrate up slowly over 5 months to reach normal dose. Uses bacteriostatic water for injections. Also uses omega-3 supplement (3g EPA+DHA daily). No other medications. Has not yet tried CJC-1295/Ipamorelin mix due to anaphylaxis concerns.
